_note: URLs updated 2026-04-04 — canonical site is ai-services-website repo. Brand name TBD. Update company/tagline/URLs again once brand decision made (wb-008).

services.name: eBay & Reseller Automation
services.description: Automated listing creation from photo batches, AI-generated titles and descriptions, pricing comp engine from sold listings, inventory tracking with restock alerts, multi-platform support (eBay, Whatnot, HiBid), estate sale batch processing.

services.name: Workflow Analysis & Automation
services.description: Map your actual operation (not the idealized version), find where time and money leak out, identify 3–5 automatable repeating processes, build only the fixes with a clear ROI, integrate between existing tools.

services.name: AI Content & Data Pipelines
services.description: Bulk product description generation, competitor research, data extraction from PDFs/web/documents, market intelligence feeds, overnight batch processing with morning reports, structured data output.

services.name: Custom Tools & Web Apps
services.description: Internal business tools (dashboards, trackers, calculators), customer-facing web apps, AI-powered lookup and identification tools, mobile-friendly, source code delivered with no lock-in.

services.name: Agent System Development
services.description: Multi-agent AI systems that coordinate multiple models to handle complex multi-step tasks automatically. Runs overnight, reports by morning. Includes error handling, logging, alerting, and documentation.

services.name: Cost Analysis & ROI Modeling
services.description: Current process time/cost baseline, automation potential scoring, build cost vs ongoing savings model, payback period calculation, written recommendation (build / don't build / alternative), tool and vendor comparison.
